response: I am a dedicated and organized professional with 15+ years of experience in medical transcription, specializing in various medical specialties including orthopedics, cardiology, gynecology, psychiatry, radiology, and more. I possess strong knowledge of medical terminology and excellent interpersonal skills, making me a reliable and team-oriented individual. I am always eager to learn and develop new skills, and I excel in supervising, transcribing, and managing customer relationships. My strong attention to detail and ability to meet tight deadlines ensure high-quality output. I have experience with platforms such as eClinicalWorks, Experity EMR, and MS Office, and I am proficient in Word, Excel, and Outlook. I am passionate about continuous improvement and am committed to contributing to the success of any organization I join.
